description: Training data extracted from OpenClaw/Claude Code TypeScript source patterns

code_completion.description: Code completion pairs with input/output split at various points

tool_use.description: Tool call examples for Bash, FileRead, FileWrite, FileEdit, Glob, Grep, WebFetch, Task, Agent, PermissionCheck

conversation.description: Multi-turn conversations for code tasks, error resolution, refactoring, and explanations

output_format: JSONL (JSON Lines - one JSON object per line)
notes: Source patterns from extended_pairs_full.json include real Claude Code codebase patterns
Code completion pairs generated by splitting functions at various line positions
Tool examples include real-world command patterns for system administration
Conversation patterns include multi-turn dialogues for learning and debugging
